rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Gov't Code §2306.207 governs a reserve fund for department bonds. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote:
Sec. 2306.207. RESERVE FUND. (a) The department may create a reserve fund with the comptroller out of:
(1) proceeds from the sale of the department's bonds; or
(2) other resources.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and this reserve fund provision.
